occupation: Interim Chief Innovation Officer at Little Dot Studios
headline: Innovation, Inspiration, Creativity, Curiosity. Human first. AI supported • BAFTA winner • BIMA 100 • OOH evangelist
summary:
Hi! I'm Dino, nice to meet you. I'm BAFTA-winning innovator known for applying unconventional thinking to complex, real-world challenges. I like dogs, fixing things, and can do a fairly decent wheelie.

I have 3 nipples, but focus on 4 things...

• I help in-house and agency teams turn their big, impossible, innovative ideas into reality.
• I deliver bespoke workshops and consultancy to deliver clarity and practical actions.
• I educate by speaking at conferences, sharing spicy thoughts and tinkering with future tech.
• I promote creativity and innovation as a profit driver in the OOH industry.

Key highlights:
• Innovation process: Helped found and run the Sky Innovation Lab, solving Sky's biggest challenges for the C-suite and 30,000 colleagues. 
• Advertising innovation: Technical and Innovation Director at one of the UK's most well known and awarded ad agencies. Turning impossible and magic into reality.
• Toys and storytelling: A fun role at Mind Candy to help with Moshi Monsters toys, games, licensing and movie promotion.
• Music and mobile: Noise Inc. A startup music agency with Vodafone, Ministry of Sound and the Brit Awards as clients.
• Entertainment marketing: Creative Director at Digital Outlook, a leading kids and family agency working with Disney, Pixar, Cartoon Network, X-Box and more.
• Games and promotion: Head of Creative Technology Europe for Disney creating games, websites and promotions for in-house brands a advertisers from LEGO to Action Man.
• CD-ROM development: Led teams making award-winning CD-ROMs for BBC licensed properties including Teletubbies, Pingu, Noddy, Wallace and Gromit and Dr-Who.
• Experiential: Developed physical installations and exhibits for the Science Museum, Heathrow terminal 5 and Millennium Dome (O2 Arena). Lasers and electronics!

Call me. It'll be a fun call.

Or watch me talk about interesting things: https://www.youtube.com/@dinozoiks

experiences.title: Interim Chief Innovation Officer
experiences.description: If you've been on to YouTube today, you've probably seen or been influenced by the content created, crafted or managed by Little Dot Studios. My role is to keep pushing us forwards, making the future feel closer, the complex seem simple and the impossible seem attainable. The CIO role is the ultimate role, fusing creativity, technology, inspiration, innovation and the unexpected. The world is speeding up, trends are getting faster, but humans will always appreciate great storytelling, by great brands, with great content, made by great people. To be part of that, and to be part of the Little Dot story is a real honour. As Chuck Norris said so eloquently, "Hold my pint... it's going to get spicy..."

experiences.title: Founder
experiences.description: Dino helps businesses explore unexpected and innovative opportunities to ensure they have a viable, valuable and exciting plan for the future. With 30 years of experience across the technology, creative and media industries, Dino brings his diverse knowledge and deeply practical approach to help leaders and teams deliver their transformation goals by taking unconventional approaches to explore the future. Innovative thinking is at the heart of everything Dino does.

experiences.title: Leader - Sky Innovation Labs
experiences.description: I’m helping create the dedicated Sky Labs as well as support the innovation process and wider innovation culture at Sky. I help coach business units and team members to discover and explore new business opportunities. We’re also (literally) building an innovation building, so working with the architects to refine and challenge the use of space to innovate within the diverse and lively Sky campus.

experiences.title: Founder
experiences.description: Founder chief bottle washer. Helping large companies and creative agencies innovate for clients and inspire their employees. Also facilitate and run business, creative and innovation workshops.

experiences.title: Director of Innovation and Technology
experiences.description: As Director of Technology and Innovation at WCRS, my job is to inspire, educate, make the complicated seem simple and join the dots that nobody thought to join.

experiences.title: Marketing / Creative
experiences.description: Responsible for game and brand development, conceiving and directing Moshi Monsters TV ads, directing the marketing collateral for the Moshi Monsters movie, creating the Moshi brand identity guidelines, licensor brand sign-off and toy development.

experiences.title: Exec Creative and Innovation Director
experiences.description: Various creative direction, content creation and strategy direction contracts.

experiences.title: Exec Creative Director
experiences.description: Founder and Creative Director in music / mobile apps startup

experiences.title: Creative Direction and Innovation consultant
experiences.description: Brief period consulting producing the overall concept, consumer journeys and technical strategy for a new US-based kids virtual world.

experiences.title: Creative Director
experiences.description: Creative direction across all forms of digital content, marketing and related media with a focus on the youth and entertainment markets. The role draws heavily on my professional experiences of being a trained designer, a games developer and someone with an in-depth knowledge of the mechanisms and commercial models that underpin the online industry.

experiences.title: Head of Creative Technology, Europe
experiences.description:
Responsible for strategy, creative development and production across all areas of digital and interactive content within Europe. My role is often described as a ‘one man agency’. My responsibilities cover the majority of commercially focused digital activities including; web based content, promotions and games, iTV services and games (Sky, Telewest and NTL), mobile content and strategy, creating mixed media promotions integrating tv, iTV, sms, web, viral and offline elements, authoring CD-ROM, music production, illustration and supporting new business initiatives.

Other commercial clients include Hasbro, McDonalds, LEGO, Nintendo, Sony, BMG, Disney, Sky, Buena Vista, The Sunday Times and the BBC.

experiences.title: Freelance
experiences.description: Clients/brands include Teletubbies, Pingu, Noddy, BBC Walking with Dinosaurs, BBC Top Gear, Coopers and Lybrand, Boots, BBC Gardeners World, Beeb.com, Lloyds TSB, The National Lottery, Arthur Andersen, Guinness, Martini, Bacardi, Agip, EMI, Bass Brewery, Littlewoods Pools, BAA, BAE, Land Rover, BMG Records, The Science Museum, Cable and Wireless and Hong Kong Telecom.

experiences.title: Freelance Creative Lead
experiences.description: Creative Direction and flash development for the Disney Digit tv show. Included games, avatar creation and virtual pets.

experiences.title: Interactive Designer
experiences.description: Created pioneering CD-ROM style guides for Guinness, Bacardi and Cinzano and wider Diageo group products.

experiences.title: Interactive designer and developer
experiences.description:
You know when you look back and think "I was so lucky to have that opportunity"? Well Media Projects was my springboard. They were a pioneering agency, exploring interactive experiences but had their roots in world leading exhibitions, visitor attractions and video production.
I role was 'the digital guy', making computers do things they weren't supposed to, making opportunities and meeting some really great people.

experiences.title: Founder
experiences.description: Dino helps businesses explore unexpected and innovative opportunities to ensure they have a viable, valuable and exciting plan for the future. With 30 years of experience across the technology, creative and media industries, Dino brings his diverse knowledge and deeply practical approach to help leaders and teams deliver their transformation goals by taking unconventional approaches to explore the future. Innovative thinking is at the heart of everything Dino does.

accomplishment_honors_awards.description: I was named one of the BIMA 100 in 2016 – BIMA’s annual showcase of 100 of the digital industry’s brightest stars.

accomplishment_honors_awards.title: D&AD - Interactive + outdoor

accomplishment_honors_awards.title: Cannes Cyber Lion - Branded Tech / Digital Billboard

accomplishment_honors_awards.title: Cannes Lion - Outdoor Digital Screen

recommendations:
Simon Rexworthy

Dino brings unmatched creativity and focus to solving business problems. Whether at Sky, driving the innovation agenda, or as a consultant for us at MultiChoice Group he has always delivered to the highest standards. Dino has a unique combination of skills (ideation, facilitation, problem solving), personality traits (energy, curiosity, enthusiasm), and know how (digital technologies, AI opportunities, consumer trends). On top of this hes a great guy to work with and builds strong teams to solve problems. 100% recommend!

Niall Sallam

I recently had the pleasure of working with Dino when we brought him in as a consultant for a large scale DOOH and smart city project. From the outset, he played a pivotal role in guiding our team through a structured process, helping us sharpen our thinking and bring clarity to complex ideas.Dino has a rare ability to bridge creative ideation with structured execution. He helped us not only generate innovative concepts but also frame them in a way that made them compelling, actionable, and strategically sound. His expertise in emerging technology, digital media, and audience engagement was instrumental in shaping how we articulate and present next-gen innovation within our business.Beyond his expertise, Dino brings an energy and enthusiasm that makes collaboration both productive and enjoyable. If you're looking for someone who can help turn big ideas into a structured, compelling vision, I highly recommend working with him.

Luke Burford

If I was assembling the Avengers, first on the team sheet – no matter what the challenge might be – would be Dino. There are so many qualities he brings to each task… energy, enthusiasm, logic, perspective, leadership, creativity, calmness, humour, plus a brilliant ability to get the very best out of people. Dino is a polymathic innovator like no other. He can build it, draw it, code it, compose it, test it, present it. Often before you realise you need that thing, Dino’s already created it. I’ve had the pleasure to work alongside Dino on a number of innovation projects routed in marketing and behavioural change. Each time, Dino has been instrumental to the success by creating multiple mechanisms to unlock new insights and ideas, while providing valuable support and advice. If you get the chance to work with Dino, take it – you’ll learn a lot, have fun and have a fantastic addition to the team.

Andrew Matjaszek

Dino Burbidge or (A True Director Of Innovation & Technology) One of the most talented individuals that I've had the pleasure of working with. I worked with Dino for approximately 12 months, in which time he consistently added magic and substance to every marketing initiative that he was involved with. He's impossible to pigeon hole with any run of the mill job description, just give him a blank piece of paper and he'll do the rest. I hope to work with him again soon!

Joseph Cahill

I worked with Dino a few years ago where he delivered a session on emerging technologies and this year he was back by popular demand with another session on emerging tech and a crash course in Generative AI. On both occasions he has proven to be a standout figure in our internal training programmes. Dino clearly knows what he’s talking about, but knowledge in itself does not make for an engaging speaker. In addition to having a clear grasp of the themes he discusses; he has an excellent ability to dial in the tone and present technical topics in a way which resonates across a broad audience and keeps everyone engaged.

Robert Leotta

I am thrilled to write this recommendation for Dino, an exceptional innovation leader who truly stands out in his field. Dino is a rare find, a unicorn in the world of innovation, and working with him has been an absolute pleasure. From the moment we started collaborating, Dino's passion for driving value and simplifying complex concepts was evident. His ability to inspire and step-change the experiences of those he works with is nothing short of remarkable. Dino's innovative thinking has enabled us to exceed expectations and stand out in our industry. Dino's leadership skills are unparalleled. He has a unique ability to supercharge business culture, department strategy, and team deliverables. His insights and expertise have been invaluable in creating practical and accessible solutions that make a real impact on our business's bottom line. Working with Dino has been a game-changer for our team. His exceptional skills and talents have enabled us to achieve results that we never thought possible. He has inspired us to think differently, challenge the status quo, and strive for excellence in everything we do. In conclusion, I highly recommend Dino to anyone looking for an innovative leader who can drive real impact for their business. With Dino on your team, you can be confident that you will exceed expectations and stand out in your industry.

Simon Rexworthy

Dino brings unmatched creativity and focus to solving business problems. Whether at Sky, driving the innovation agenda, or as a consultant for us at MultiChoice Group he has always delivered to the highest standards. Dino has a unique combination of skills (ideation, facilitation, problem solving), personality traits (energy, curiosity, enthusiasm), and know how (digital technologies, AI opportunities, consumer trends). On top of this he’s a great guy to work with and builds strong teams to solve problems. 100% recommend!
